principle: Work that does not transitively depend on any missing semantic entity may proceed. All other work is blocked pending human response.

continuable_tasks.description: Run linters and auto-formatters on existing source files
continuable_tasks.reason: Linting operates on syntax only and does not require semantic definitions

continuable_tasks.description: Generate API documentation for already-validated modules
continuable_tasks.reason: Documentation generation only processes docstrings and type annotations

continuable_tasks.description: Write test scaffolding and fixture loaders that do not depend on specific numerical results
continuable_tasks.reason: Test infrastructure can be built independent of semantic content

continuable_tasks.description: Define type stubs and data models for expressions
continuable_tasks.reason: Type definitions are structural and do not require semantic content
